title: Datasets and code for "TIGIT Preserves Memory and Enhances Antitumor Potency of CAR-T Cells"
author: Mo, Zhuomao
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The uploaded files including the processed public dastaset from GSE197268, the validated cohort, in-vitro bulk RNA count and corresponding R code. Both the data and code are available upon request.
steps_raw: The uploaded files including the processed public dastaset from GSE197268, the validated cohort, in-vitro bulk RNA count and corresponding R code. Both the data and code are available upon request.
